title: Air-Fried Beef Gravy Wrap
description: A salty, silky, comforting Australian dish featuring beef gravy served in a low-calorie-friendly air-fry wrap.
instructions: In a shallow bowl, combine the flour, salt, black pepper, ground cumin, and ground coriander.
Add the beef mince to the bowl with the spices. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Heat vegetable oil in an air fryer basket over medium-high heat for about 2 minutes or until hot.
Place the seasoned beef mixture into the hot air fryer basket and cook for about 10-15 minutes, flipping occasionally to ensure even cooking.
While the beef is cooking, warm your wrap according to its package instructions. Once warmed, spoon a generous portion of beef gravy over one half of the wrapped beef mixture.
Fold the other half of the wrap over the beef mixture for serving.
